description: Style NoteMulti purpose bags with oodles of style and tons of detailing mark baggit out - and they also succeed in keeping the designs understated and charming. Easily to pair up with whatever you're wearing to complement any outfit. Go ahead and grab your favourite from Baggit's classy range of bags. Product DetailsTeal printed bagTwo short handlesOne main zippered compartment with internal zippered pocketOne zippered compartment on the side of the main compartmentOne zippered compartment at the backMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean damp cloth when neededSizeHeight: 35 cm Width:  53 cm
